'''Sassallo''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crimelord that was allowed by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Adria Reyn]] to rule [[Ord Vaxal]]. Sassallo specifically controlled the [[Oubliette (shadowport)|Oubliette]] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] and was a member of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]].
